query: INSERT INTO rigs (worker, pool_url, pool_user, pool_password, pool_authority, advertised_ths, price_per_th_day, price_min_per_th_day, price_max_per_th_day, payout_address, rentable) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?) ON CONFLICT(worker) DO UPDATE SET pool_url=excluded.pool_url, pool_user=excluded.pool_user, pool_password=excluded.pool_password, pool_authority=excluded.pool_authority, advertised_ths=excluded.advertised_ths, price_per_th_day=excluded.price_per_th_day, price_min_per_th_day=excluded.price_min_per_th_day, price_max_per_th_day=excluded.price_max_per_th_day, payout_address=excluded.payout_address, rentable=excluded.rentable
